title: Research: Zig-style project.pn manifest vs path-driven layout
body:
## What was done

Documented a **project.pn** Build API (Zig-influenced), lockfile lifecycle, and Daggy-based dependency resolution—compared against Go/Gleam path-driven layouts.

## Why it mattered

Explored whether Pecan/Beskid needed a single manifest file vs convention-based project trees before committing platform packaging.

## Research conclusion

**Not adopted.** Later bands standardized on **`Project.proj`** and **pckg** registry flows instead of `project.pn`.

source.subject: Add build workflow, lockfile lifecycle, and Daggy-based dependency resolution to project system documentation
